name: Bloomington Pickleball Warehouse
description: Bloomington Pickleball Warehouse is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bloomington, IN. There are 8 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and youth programming. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.
